# Drut

> Drut is an AI-powered practice platform for Indian engineering entrance
> exams, focused on AP EAPCET and TG EAPCET (Andhra Pradesh and Telangana
> Engineering, Agriculture and Pharmacy Common Entrance Tests). Drut trains
> students to solve exam questions faster using exam-grade practice
> questions, step-by-step solutions, and speed analytics.

Drut (the word means "fast tempo" in Indian classical music) is built on a
simple premise: in rank-based entrance exams, time is the difference
between a rank and a rejection. Most students know the concepts; they lose
ranks because they solve too slowly.

## What Drut offers

- Exam-grade practice questions for AP EAPCET and TG EAPCET (Physics,
  Chemistry, Mathematics), mapped chapter-by-chapter to the Intermediate
  (Class 11 and 12) syllabus
- Two solutions for every question: "The Optimal Path" (the fastest exam
  technique — Trigger, Action, Result) and a full step-by-step solution
  (Diagnose, Extract, Execute, Proof)
- Per-question time targets calibrated to real exam pacing
- Speed analytics: where a student loses time, which solving patterns are
  slow, and which chapters need work
- Sprint mode: timed bursts that simulate exam pressure

## Status

Drut is in closed beta (2026) with a public launch planned for the 2027
EAPCET season. The product is free during beta.

## Site

- Landing and waitlist: https://www.drut.club/
- Privacy policy: https://www.drut.club/privacypolicy
- Terms: https://www.drut.club/termsandconditions
